name: Wealthbox CRM for Financial Advisors API
what_it_does: Wealthbox CRM financial advisor REST API for modern client relationship management, collaboration, and advisor workflow automation. Enables AI agents to manage client and household contact data for advisor relationship tracking, handle activity stream and task management for advisor team collaboration, access opportunity and pipeline tracking for advisor business development, retrieve note and document management for client interaction capture, manage workflow automation and template triggers for consistent advisor service, handle email integration and communication logging for client communication tracking, access reporting and analytics for advisor practice performance, retrieve team collaboration and staff assignment for multi-advisor practice management, manage integration with portfolio management and financial planning platforms for unified advisor workflow, and integrate Wealthbox with Riskalyze, Orion, and other wealthtech ecosystem tools.
use_cases: Tracking client activities from advisor relationship agents
Managing business pipeline from advisor sales agents
Automating advisor workflows from practice management agents
Logging client communications from compliance documentation agents
not_for: Non-financial advisor CRM without wealthtech integration needs
Institutional managers without retail client relationship focus
High-volume transactional CRM without relationship depth
best_when: An RIA or wealth management team using Wealthbox wanting AI agents to automate client contact management, activity tracking, opportunity pipeline, team collaboration, and wealthtech ecosystem integration.
avoid_when: GLBA NPI SAFEGUARDS: Wealthbox contains Non-Public Personal Information subject to Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act Safeguards Rule; automated third-party integrations and data exports must include safeguards assessment; inadequate data controls create GLBA privacy and security violation. SEC/FINRA BOOKS AND RECORDS: Advisor CRM activity records may constitute books and records for SEC-registered advisers; automated deletion or modification of client interaction records creates regulatory books-and-records violation. Communication recordkeeping — automated email and communication logging must capture all material client communications; gaps in automated logging create FINRA Rule 4511 / SEC Rule 17a-4 compliance exposure for broker-dealer associated advisors. OAuth token management — Wealthbox OAuth tokens can be long-lived; implement token rotation and access control for automated agent credentials to limit exposure on credential compromise.

auth.notes: Wealthbox uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2014. Private (private equity-backed). Modern financial advisor CRM. 20,000+ advisor users. Activity stream design. Strong wealthtech ecosystem integrations. Competes with Redtail, Junxure (SS&C), and Salesforce FSC for advisor CRM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user monthly subscription; team and enterprise tiers
pricing.notes: New York. Private equity-backed. Founded 2014. 20,000+ advisor users. Activity stream CRM design. Modern wealthtech ecosystem integrations.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key and OAuth client; documented in developer docs

known_agent_gotchas: GLBA SAFEGUARDS FOR NPI: Wealthbox client data is NPI under Gramm-Leach-Bliley; automated integration partners accessing Wealthbox via API must have GLBA Safeguards assessment and written contract data protections; inadequate vendor controls create GLBA violation for the RIA

SEC books and records immutability — advisor activity records in Wealthbox may be regulatory books and records; automated deletion or backdating of contact records creates SEC Rule 204-2 books-and-records violation for RIAs
OAuth scope minimization — Wealthbox OAuth supports scopes; automated agents must request minimum necessary scopes; broad scope grants on compromised credentials expose full client relationship data

Webhook signature verification — Wealthbox webhooks must verify HMAC signature to prevent spoofed event injection into automated workflows; unsigned webhook acceptance creates event injection vulnerability

Activity stream ordering — Wealthbox API activity stream pagination must handle eventual consistency; automated workflows reading activity stream should use created_at ordering and tolerate brief ordering inconsistencies

Communication capture completeness — automated communication logging may not capture all channels (phone, in-person, text); automated compliance logging gaps create books-and-records exposure for broker-dealer associated advisors
agent_readiness.security_notes: Financial advisor CRM. SOC2. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US. Client NPI and GLBA-protected data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Financial advisor CRM. SOC2. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Client NPI and GLBA data.
